name: Bangers or Oxford Sausages
recipeIngredient: 3 slices Of white bread with crust,
1 tsp Loosely packed finely grated lemon peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pork, veal, fat, and bread crumbs in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the salt, pepper, cayenne, nutmeg, mace, thyme, marjoram, sage, and lemon peel with the egg until well combined.
3. Add the egg mixture to the meat mixture and knead until everything is thoroughly incorporated.
4. Stuff the mixture into prepared hog casings using a sausage stuffer or large syringe.
5. Prick any air pockets with a pin or needle.
6. Refrigerate raw sausages for up to 3 days, poach, braise, or fry before serving.
7. Poached or braised sausages can be refrigerated for up to 1 week.
8. Sausages can also be frozen in their uncooked state for up to 3 months.
